message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "user" as user
participant "runtime" as runtime
participant "ibex" as ibex
participant "ibex.sklearn" as ibex_sklearn
participant "loader" as loader
participant "sklearn.linear_model" as sklearn_linear_model

user -> runtime: 1 import ibex.sklearn.linear_model
runtime -> ibex: 2 import ibex
runtime -> ibex_sklearn: 3 import ibex.sklearn
ibex_sklearn -> ibex_sklearn: 4 register sys.metapath
runtime -> loader: 5 import ibex.sklearn.linear_model
loader -> sklearn_linear_model: 6 dir
sklearn_linear_model -> loader: 7 members
loader -> loader: 8 inspect
loader -> loader: 9 wrap

@enduml
